prompt: A photorealistic AI brand spokesperson in a modern minimalist office, 35mm at full-body distance — subject occupying right two-thirds, environment breathing on left, warm natural light picking out professional business casual attire and separating figure cleanly from background, atmospheric depth making the space three-dimensional, 16:9. Create this as a simple low-resolution thumbnail-style cinematic still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
